attachment.content:
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring cloud agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a GitHub pull request; for your working diff use /code-review
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

This appears to be investigating how the Idle animation is currently implemented, looking at:

- Where `PlaySpineLoop()` is called
- The flow of when Idle animation starts/stops

The grep found 12 lines across two files:

Key findings from the grep:

- `ResumeIdle()` calls `PlaySpineLoop(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Idle)`
- Idle animation is stopped when spinning starts and doesn't auto-resume after spin

  <narrative>Investigated the current implementation of BigWheel's Idle animation system to prepare for Conflict 1 modifications. The grep revealed that the idle animation is controlled through a RESUME_IDLE event that triggers the ResumeIdle() method, which in turn calls PlaySpineLoop() with the Idle animation name. The system has explicit control flow where idle animation stops when spinning begins and requires manual resumption via RESUME_IDLE event dispatch. This non-automatic resumption is by design, as noted in comments at line 398 ("轉完「不」自動恢復"). The m_isIdling flag tracks whether the wheel is in slow idle rotation state. Understanding this flow is essential for implementing the proposed changes to add fast-forward idle animation behavior while preserving the existing manual resume pattern.</narrative>

}\\n\\n            // 倍率值已移除：清空 Label，避免殘留設計期/前一次的文字\\n            const label = this.m_segmentValueLabels[i];\\n            if (label) {\\n                label.string = '';\\n            }\\n   //#endregion 屬性\\n\\n    //#region 常數\\n    /**@ch 轉動時間（秒）；拉長以降低峰值角速度，減輕 12 格重複圖樣的車輪錯覺（視覺反向）*/\\n    private static readonly ROTATE_TIME = 3;//2.5;\\n    //#endregion 常數\\n\\n    //#region 變數\\n    /**@ch 遊戲視窗*/\\n    private m_gameView: GameView = null;\\n    /**@ch 是否初始化*/\\n    private m_isInit = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否轉動中（轉動中/閒置兩互斥態）*/\\n    private m_isSpinning = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否處於 變數\\n\\n    //#region 生命週期\\n    onLoad() {\\n        this.RegisterEvent();\\n        this.DevAssertConfig();\\n        this.RegisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    onDestroy() {\\n   //#endregion 事件註冊\\n\\n    //#region 方法\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 初始化（IF-1）\\n     */\\n    private Init(gameView: GameView) {\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n        this.m_isInit = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置 12 格資料並更新 icon（IF-2 / BC-5 / EH-2）\\n     * @param segments server 給的 12 格資料\\n     */\\n    private SetWheelData(segments: SegmentDescriptor[]) {\\n        // BC-9 }\\n\\n            // 倍率值已移除：清空 Label，避免殘留設計期/前一次的文字\\n            const label = this.m_segmentValueLabels[i];\\n            if (label) {\\n                label.string = '';\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 轉動並落在指定格（IF-3 / BC-3 / BC-6 / BC-7 / BC-8 / BC-9 / EH-1 / EH-3）\\n     * 守衛順序（DR-10）：① 轉動中重入 → ② 未初始化/無資料 → ③ landIndex 範圍\\n     * 完成訊號鏈（DR-2 / BC-7）：await 轉動 → }\\n        // ② EH-3 未初始化或無資料\\n        if (!this.m_isInit || this.m_segments.length === 0) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 未初始化或尚未設置輪盤資料');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        //         }\\n                    resolve();\\n                })\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 落點演出（BC-7）：BigWheel Spine 取代結果展示牌——依落點 type 切 skin，播 this.PlaySpineOnce(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Collect);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch [已停用] 套用落點 type 對應圖到結果展示牌 SpriteChange。\\n     * ⚠️ Collect 動畫取代結果展示牌後無呼叫者；保留待美術定案後連同 m_result* 屬性整條移除。\\n     */\\n    private ApplyResultSprite(spriteChange: SpriteChange | null, type: FeatureWheelSegmentType) {\\n        if (!spriteChange) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (type ===    * @ch [已停用] 結果展示牌收場（HIDE_RESULT / SetUIShow(false) 呼叫）。\\n     * ⚠️ 不可在此關閉 m_resultNode——該節點現為 BigWheel Spine 的父容器，關閉會連帶隱藏 BigWheel。\\n     * Collect 取代結果展示牌後無實際收場需求，保留空實作以相容既有事件/呼叫；\\n     * TODO(清理)：result-card 路徑（ApplyResultSprite / m_result* 屬性）全面移除後刪此方法。\\n     */\\n    private HideResult() {\\n        // no-op：m_resultNode 已挪作 BigWheel 容器，不可在此 active=false\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 顯示/隱藏 UI（IF-4）\\n     */\\n    private SetUIShow(isShow: boolean) {\\n        if (this.m_rootNode) {\\n            this.m_rootNode.active = isShow;\\n        }\\n        // 隱藏 UI 時一併收掉結果展示牌，避免下次顯示殘留上一輪落點符號\\n        if (!isShow) {\\n            this.HideResult();\\n        }\\n        // Idle：顯示時開始緩轉、隱藏時停止（PlaySpin 後不自動恢復，須由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復）\\n        this.m_isIdle = this.PlaySpineLoop(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Idle);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放進場 Active（一個 round 一次，落在第一次轉動前）；播畢回調。\\n     * 進場用 default skin（中間尚未落定功能）。Spine 缺失 → PlaySpineOnce 立即 resolve，不 hang   <narrative>Added a new constant IDLE_STANDBY_TIME_SCALE to control the playback speed of the BigWheel's Idle animation during standby state. false;\\n    /**@ch 是否處於 Idle 緩轉態（SHOW_UI/RESUME_IDLE 開、HIDE_UI/PlaySpin 關；轉動中由 m_isSpinning 暫停，轉完不自動恢復）*/\\n    private m_isIdle = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否已註冊事件*/\\n    private m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    /**@ch 當前 12 格資料*/\\n    private m_segments: SegmentDescriptor[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 事件列表*/\\n    private readonly EVENT_LIST: string[] = [\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_EXIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.GET_TARGET_NODE,\\n    ];\\n    //#endregion 變數\\n\\n    //#region 生命週期\\n    onLoad() {\\n        this.RegisterEvent();\\n        this.DevAssertConfig();\\n        this.RegisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    onDestroy() {\\n        this.UnregisterEvent();\\n        this.UnregisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 每幀 Idle 緩轉：僅在 Idle 態且非轉動中執行（兩旋轉路徑互斥，不同幀寫 m_wheelNode）\\n     * 方向跟隨 m_clockwise（順時針 = z 遞減，與 ComputeTargetAngle 一致）\\n     */\\n    update(dt: number) {\\n        if (!this.m_isIdle || this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_idleSecondsPerRev <= 0) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const dir = this.m_clockwise ? -1 : 1;\\n        const deltaAngle = dir * (360 / this.m_idleSecondsPerRev) * dt;\\n        // 正規化防 BC-8 連續累積漂移（與 RotateToIndex 收尾一致），spin 起點讀 currentAngle 仍正確\\n        const next = NormalizeAngle(this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z + deltaAngle);\\n        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, next);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 生命週期\\n\\n    //#region 事件註冊\\n    private RegisterEvent() {\\n        if (this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = true;\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.Register(event, this));\\n    }\\n\\n    private UnregisterEvent() {\\n        if (!this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.UnRegister(event, this));\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件分派\\n     */\\n    OnEvent(event: string, ...args: any[]) {\\n        switch (event) {\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'object' && args[0] !== null) {\\n                    this.Init(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel INIT 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && Array.isArray(args[0])) {\\n                    this.SetWheelData(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel SET_WHEEL_DATA 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'number') {\\n                    this.PlaySpin(args[0], typeof args[1] === 'function' ? args[1] : undefined);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel PLAY_SPIN 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(false);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER:\\n                this.PlayEnter(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_EXIT:\\n                this.PlayExit(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE:\\n FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.GET_TARGET_NODE:\\n                if (typeof args[0] === 'function') {\\n                    args[0](this.GetTargetNode());\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel GET_TARGET_NODE 缺少 callback');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 取得目標節點（飛行演出起點）：m_targetNode → 根節點 → 自身節點 依序 fallback。\\n     * @returns 目標 Node（理論上不為 null；m_targetNode/m_rootNode 未掛時退回 this.node）\\n     */\\n    private GetTargetNode(): Node {\\n        return this.m_targetNode ?? this.m_rootNode ?? this.node;\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 事件註冊\\n\\n    //#region 方法\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 初始化（IF-1）\\n     */\\n    private Init(gameView: GameView) {\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n        this.m_isInit = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置 12 格資料並更新 icon（IF-2 / BC-5 / EH-2）\\n     * @param segments server 給的 12 格資料\\n     */\\n    private SetWheelData(segments: SegmentDescriptor[]) {\\n        // BC-9 行為約束：轉動中拒絕換資料，避免落點與顯示不一致\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 轉動中，拒絕本次設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!segments) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 資料為空');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 > 12 取前 12\\n        if (segments.length > FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${segments.length} > ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，取前 ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT} 格`);\\n        }\\n        this.m_segments = segments.slice(0, FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT);\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 < 12 → 渲染已提供格，其餘格保持預設\\n        if (this.m_segments.length < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${this.m_segments.length} < ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，其餘格保持預設`);\\n        }\\n\\n        this.BindSegmentIcons();\\n\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n\\n        // 待機慢速 Idle：資料就緒即進入待機呼吸/慢轉（BigWheel 一直可見），與 m_isIdle 同步\\n        this.PlayIdleStandby();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依當前資料綁定各格 icon（BC-4 / EH-2）\\n     * None / 無資料格 → 清空不顯示；其餘依 type 換圖。倍率值已移除，Label 一律清空防殘留。\\n     * FS_BG 底圖：僅該格 type 為 FreeGame 時開啟（作底凸顯免費遊戲符號）；其餘格關閉以保冪等（R-2）。\\n     */\\n    private BindSegmentIcons() {\\n        // 迭代固定 12 格確保冪等（R-2）：二次設定變少時，超出資料的格重置為預設，不殘留舊值\\n        for (let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n            const seg = i < this.m_segments.length ? this.m_segments[i] : null;\\n\\n            // 換 icon：None / 無資料格 → 清空（暫不顯示）；其餘依 type 換圖（BC-4）\\n            const spriteChange = this.m_segmentSpriteChanges[i];\\n            if (spriteChange) {\\n                if (!seg || seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n                    spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n                } else {\\n                    spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(seg.type));\\n                }\\n\\n                // FS_BG 底圖：與 icon 同生命週期，從同格 item root 取子節點（無資料/非 FreeGame 一律關，保冪等）\\n                const fsBg = spriteChange.node?.getChildByName('FS_BG');\\n                if (fsBg) {\\n                    fsBg.active = !!seg && seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.FreeGame;\\n                }\\n            }\\n\\n            // 倍率值已移除：清空 Label，避免殘留設計期/前一次的文字\\n            const label = this.m_segmentValueLabels[i];\\n            if (label) {\\n                label.string = '';\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 轉動並落在指定格（IF-3 / BC-3 / BC-6 / BC-7 / BC-8 / BC-9 / EH-1 / EH-3）\\n     * 守衛順序（DR-10）：① 轉動中重入 → ② 未初始化/無資料 → ③ landIndex 範圍\\n     * 完成訊號鏈（DR-2 / BC-7）：await 轉動 → await 落點演出 → callback → 最後釋放 m_isSpinning\\n     * @param landIndex 落點格索引 (0~11)\\n     * @param callback 完成回調，帶選中格 {index, type, value}\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySpin(landIndex: number, callback?: (result: SpinResult) => void) {\\n        // ① BC-9 轉動中重入 → 忽略\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動中，忽略本次請求');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ② EH-3 未初始化或無資料\\n        if (!this.m_isInit || this.m_segments.length === 0) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 未初始化或尚未設置輪盤資料');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ③ EH-1 landIndex 範圍\\n        if (landIndex < 0 || landIndex >= FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel PlaySpin landIndex ${landIndex} 超出範圍 0~${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT - 1}`);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_isSpinning = true;\\n        // 轉動開始即關閉 Idle：轉完「不」自動恢復；待盤面其他表演結束由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復\\n        this.m_isIdle = false;\\n        try {\\n            await this.RotateToIndex(landIndex);     // BC-3 / BC-6\\n            await this.PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex);  // BC-7\\n            const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n            // callback 包獨立 try（R-1）：呼叫端 callback 自身例外不被遮蔽成「轉動失敗」\\n            try {\\n                callback?.({ index: landIndex, type: seg.type });\\n            } catch (cbErr) {\\n                error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin callback 執行失敗: ' + cbErr);\\n            }\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動/演出失敗: ' + e);\\n        } finally {\\n            // BC-7：釋放點在 callback 之後，避免演出/回呼期間被重入\\n            this.m_isSpinning = false;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 旋轉到 landIndex，停在頂端指針（BC-3 / BC-6）\\n     * 角度計算用 ComputeTargetAngle（依 m_clockwise 單向單調，不沿用會反向的 angleDiff）\\n     */\\n    private RotateToIndex(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n                resolve();\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            const currentAngle = this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z;\\n            const targetAngle = ComputeTargetAngle(landIndex, currentAngle, this.m_clockwise);\\n            const anim = { angle: currentAngle };\\n            tween(anim)\\n                .to(FeatureWheelManager.ROTATE_TIME, { angle: targetAngle }, {\\n                    easing: 'cubicOut',\\n                    onUpdate: () => {\\n                        if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                            this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, anim.angle);\\n                        }\\n                    },\\n                })\\n                .call(() => {\\n                    // DR-9：轉動結束後正規化角度，防 BC-8 連續轉動累積漂移\\n                    if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, NormalizeAngle(targetAngle));\\n                    }\\n                    resolve();\\n                })\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 落點演出（BC-7）：BigWheel Spine 取代結果展示牌——依落點 type 切 skin，播 Collect「中間功能亮起」，await 播畢才 resolve。\\n     * 時序：呼叫端在 RotateToIndex（轉輪停下）後呼叫，符合「轉輪停下來後中間功能亮起」。\\n     * Collect 播畢後中間維持亮起（end pose），退場由 PlayExit 的 Out（盤面回歸+暗掉）負責。\\n     * Spine 缺失（m_bigWheelSpine 未綁）→ PlaySpineOnce 立即 resolve，不 hang 呼叫端。\\n     */\\n    private async PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n        if (!seg) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // 先切到落點功能 skin（Multiplier/Upgrade/Shift 直對；FG/Grand/None → default），再播 Collect\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(TypeToSkin(seg.type));\\n        await this.PlaySpineOnce(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Collect);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch [已停用] 套用落點 type 對應圖到結果展示牌 SpriteChange。\\n     * ⚠️ Collect 動畫取代結果展示牌後無呼叫者；保留待美術定案後連同 m_result* 屬性整條移除。\\n     */\\n    private ApplyResultSprite(spriteChange: SpriteChange | null, type: FeatureWheelSegmentType) {\\n        if (!spriteChange) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n            spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n        } else {\\n            spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(type));\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch [已停用] 結果展示牌收場（HIDE_RESULT / SetUIShow(false) 呼叫）。\\n     * ⚠️ 不可在此關閉 m_resultNode——該節點現為 BigWheel Spine 的父容器，關閉會連帶隱藏 BigWheel。\\n     * Collect 取代結果展示牌後無實際收場需求，保留空實作以相容既有事件/呼叫；\\n     * TODO(清理)：result-card 路徑（ApplyResultSprite / m_result* 屬性）全面移除後刪此方法。\\n     */\\n    private HideResult() {\\n        // no-op：m_resultNode 已挪作 BigWheel 容器，不可在此 active=false\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 顯示/隱藏 UI（IF-4）\\n     */\\n    private SetUIShow(isShow: boolean) {\\n        if (this.m_rootNode) {\\n            this.m_rootNode.active = isShow;\\n        }\\n        // 隱藏 UI 時一併收掉結果展示牌，避免下次顯示殘留上一輪落點符號\\n        if (!isShow) {\\n            this.HideResult();\\n        }\\n        // Idle：顯示時開始緩轉、隱藏時停止（PlaySpin 後不自動恢復，須由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復）\\n        this.m_isIdle = isShow;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 手動恢復 Idle 緩轉（IF）+ 播 BigWheel Idle 待機呼吸\\n     * 用途：PlaySpin 後輪盤停住，呼叫端在盤面其他表演結束後觸發此方法才續轉\\n     * 注意：若仍在轉動中，由 update 的 m_isSpinning 守衛延後至轉完才實際緩轉\\n     * Spine：回 default skin + 播 Idle 循環（呼吸效果）；軟體 12 格緩轉與 Spine 呼吸為兩獨立層\\n     */\\n    private ResumeIdle() {\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN);\\n        this.PlaySpineLoop(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Idle);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放進場 Active（一個 round 一次，落在第一次轉動前）；播畢回調。\\n     * 進場用 default skin（中間尚未落定功能）。Spine 缺失 → PlaySpineOnce 立即 resolve，不 hang 呼叫端。\\n     * @param onDone 動畫播畢回調\\n     */\\n    private async PlayEnter(onDone?: () => void) {\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN);\\n        await this.PlaySpineOnce(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Active);\\n        try {\\n            onDone?.();\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlayEnter onDone 失敗: ' + e);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放退場 Out（一個 round 一次，落在全部轉動與效果演完後）；播畢回調。\\n     * Out 的「中間功能暗掉」作用於當前落點 skin，故 setSkin(default) 放在 Out 之後（暗掉後再回 default 待 Idle）。\\n     * @param onDone 動畫播畢回調\\n     */\\n    private async PlayExit(onDone?: () => void) {\\n        await this.PlaySpineOnce(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Out);\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN);\\n        try {\\n            onDone?.();\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlayExit onDone 失敗: ' + e);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設定 BigWheel skin（null/失效守衛）。委派 BaseSpine.SetSkin（內含 setSlotsToSetupPose）\\n     * @param skinName skin 名（default/Multiplier/Shift/Upgrade）\\n     */\\n    private SetSpineSkin(skinName: string) {\\n        if (this.m_bigWheelSpine && this.m_bigWheelSpine.isValid) {\\n            this.m_bigWheelSpine.SetSkin(skinName);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放 BigWheel 單次（非循環）動畫，await 播畢/中斷才 resolve。委派 SpineKit（經 BaseSpine.PlayAnimation）。\\n     * Spine 缺失 → 立即 resolve；動畫名無效 → BaseSpine 內部 warn + 回 false，皆不 hang 呼叫端（DR-2 完成訊號鏈防 hang）。\\n     * @param animName 動畫名（Active/Collect/Out）\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySpineOnce(animName: string): Promise<void> {\\n        if (!this.m_bigWheelSpine || !this.m_bigWheelSpine.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // BaseSpine.PlayAnimation 回 Promise<boolean>（播畢/中斷時 resolve）；此處只需等其結束，忽略結果旗標\\n        await this.m_bigWheelSpine.PlayAnimation(animName, undefined, false);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放 BigWheel 循環動畫（Idle 待機呼吸），不 await（循環動畫不等完成）。委派 SpineKit（經 BaseSpine.PlayAnimation）。\\n     * @param animName 動畫名（Idle）\\n     */\\n    private PlaySpineLoop(animName: string) {\\n        if (!this.m_bigWheelSpine || !this.m_bigWheelSpine.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // 循環播放：isLoop=true；回傳 Promise 於首圈完成 resolve，不 await（不影響續循環）\\n        this.m_bigWheelSpine.PlayAnimation(animName, undefined, true);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch dev-only 設定斷言（DR-3/DR-12 緩解：驗節點數量，順序語意仍須人工核對 prefab）\\n     */\\n    private DevAssertConfig() {\\n        if (!DEV) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_segmentSpriteChanges.length !== FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel 設定異常：SpriteChange 數 ${this.m_segmentSpriteChanges.length} ≠ ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}`);\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_segmentNodes.length !== FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel 設定異常：落點節點數 ${this.m_segmentNodes.length} ≠ ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}`);\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 方法\\n\\n    //#region 測試功能\\n    /**@ch 測試用：當前轉動落點索引（每次轉動 +1 循環 0~11）*/\\n    private m_testLandIndex = 0;\\n    /**@ch 測試用：當前 UI 顯示狀態（給 DIGIT_4 切換）*/\\n    private m_testUIShown = false;\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 註冊測試按鍵（僅 DEBUG 構建生效；正式構建零副作用）\\n     */\\n    private RegisterTestKeyCodes() {\\n        if (!DEBUG) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        input.on(Input.EventType.KEY_DOWN, this.CheckTestKeyCode, this);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 資料為空');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 > 12 取前 12\\n        if (segments.length > FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT);\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 < 12 → 渲染已提供格，其餘格保持預設\\n        if (this.m_segments.length < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${this.m_segments.length} < ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，其餘格保持預設`);\\n        }\\n\\n        this.BindSegmentIcons();\\n\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n\\n        // 待機慢速 Idle：資料就緒即進入待機呼吸/慢轉（BigWheel 一直可見），與 m_isIdle 同步\\n        this.PlayIdleStandby();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依當前資料綁定各格 icon（BC-4 / EH-2）\\n     * None / 無資料格 → 清空不顯示；其餘依 type 換圖。倍率值已移除，Label 一律清空防殘留。\\n     * FS_BG 底圖：僅該格 type 為 FreeGame 時開啟（作底凸顯免費遊戲符號）；其餘格關閉以保冪等（R-2）。\\n     */\\n    private BindSegmentIcons() {\\n        // 迭代固定 12 格確保冪等（R-2）：二次設定變少時，超出資料的格重置為預設，不殘留舊值\\n        for (let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n            const seg = i < this.m_segments.length ? this.m_segments[i] : null;\\n\\n            // 換 icon：None / 無資料格 → 清空（暫不顯示）；其餘依 type 換圖（BC-4）\\n            const spriteChange = this.m_segmentSpriteChanges[i];\\n            if (spriteChange) {\\n                if (!seg || seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n                    spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n                } else {\\n                    spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(seg.type));\\n                }\\n\\n                // FS_BG 底圖：與 icon 同生命週期，從同格 item root 取子節點（無資料/非 FreeGame 一律關，保冪等）\\n                const fsBg = spriteChange.node?.getChildByName('FS_BG');\\n                if (fsBg) {\\n                    fsBg.active = !!seg &&      if (label) {\\n                label.string = '';\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 轉動並落在指定格（IF-3 / BC-3 / BC-6 / BC-7 / BC-8 / BC-9 / EH-1 / EH-3）\\n     * content.thinking:
This is an important change - the user is implementing fast-forward Idle animation during the spin. Let me analyze what's happening:

1. When PlaySpin starts (after setting m_isSpinning = true and m_isIdle = false)
2. Before the actual rotation begins (before RotateToIndex)
3. The code now:
   - Resets to default skin (to avoid residual feature icons from previous spins in multi-spin rounds)
   - Plays Idle animation in loop at normal speed (not the slow 0.2x standby speed)

The comments explain:
- This is the "fast-forward visual" for during the spin
- Resetting to default skin prevents leftover feature icons from the previous landing
- Playing normal-speed Idle loop provides animation during the spin
- When the wheel stops, PlayLandAnnounce's Collect animation will naturally override this Idle via clearTrack(0)

This is part of the dual-speed Idle animation system:
- Slow standby Idle (0.2x via IDLE_STANDBY_TIME_SCALE) when waiting
- Normal speed Idle (1.0x) during the actual spin for visual feedback

This is modification #3 or #4 from the proposed 6 changes for Conflict 1.

content.text:
```xml
<observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>Added fast-forward Idle animation during wheel spin</title>
  <subtitle>PlaySpin now plays normal-speed Idle loop during rotation, with default skin to clear previous landing icons</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>SetSpineSkin(BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN) call added at start of PlaySpin, before RotateToIndex</fact>
    <fact>PlaySpineLoop(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Idle) call added immediately after skin reset</fact>
    <fact>Default skin reset prevents residual feature icons from previous spin in multi-spin rounds</fact>
    <fact>Normal-speed Idle loop plays during wheel rotation as visual animation</fact>
    <fact>PlayLandAnnounce's Collect animation naturally overrides this Idle via clearTrack(0) when wheel stops</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Implemented fast-forward Idle animation during wheel spin as part of the dual-speed idle animation system. When PlaySpin begins (after m_isIdle is set to false), the code now resets BigWheel to default skin and plays Idle animation in loop at normal speed (1.0x, not the 0.2x standby speed). The skin reset is critical for multi-spin scenarios: it clears any residual feature icons from the previous landing, ensuring a clean slate for the new spin. The normal-speed Idle loop provides continuous visual animation during the rotation. When the wheel stops, PlayLandAnnounce's Collect animation naturally takes over via clearTrack(0), creating a seamless transition from spinning to landing presentation. This complements the slow standby Idle (0.2x) that plays when the wheel is waiting, creating a responsive visual system where animation speed reflects wheel activity state.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
    <concept>problem-solution</concept>
  </concepts>

    <file>assets/Script/FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelManager.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

Idle，skin 依落點功能切換。\\n     * 播放走 BaseSpine（內部 SpineKit，含動畫存在檢查 + setSlotsToSetupPose）。拖 FeatureWheelResult 節點（其上有 BaseSpine）。\\n     * Collect 取代結果展示牌（m_result* 已停用，僅保留屬性避免 prefab 反序列化警告）。\\n     */\\n    @property({ type: BaseSpine, displayName: 'BigWheel BaseSpine' })\\n    private m_bigWheelSpine: BaseSpine = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 轉動方向：勾選=順時針，取消=逆時針（預設順時針）*/\\n    @property({ displayName: '順時針轉動' })\\n    private m_clockwise: boolean = true;\\n\\n    /**@ch Idle 緩轉一圈秒數（越大越慢；≤0 視為不緩轉）；方向跟隨「順時針轉動」*/\\n    @property({ displayName: 'Idle 一圈秒數' })\\n    private m_idleSecondsPerRev: number = 60;\\n    //#endregion 屬性\\n\\n    //#region 常數\\n    /**@ch 轉動時間（秒）；拉長以降低峰值角速度，減輕 12 格重複圖樣的車輪錯覺（視覺反向）*/\\n    private static readonly ROTATE_TIME = 3;//2.5;\\n\\n    /**@ch 待機 Idle 動畫播放速度（絕對值，不乘 SpeedUp；裝飾性慢速呼吸/慢轉，越小越慢）*/\\n    private static readonly IDLE_STANDBY_TIME_SCALE = 0.2;\\n    //#endregion 常數\\n\\n    //#region 變數\\n    /**@ch 遊戲視窗*/\\n    private m_gameView: GameView = null;\\n    /**@ch 是否初始化*/\\n    private m_isInit = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否轉動中（轉動中/閒置兩互斥態）*/\\n    private m_isSpinning = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否處於 Idle 緩轉態（SHOW_UI/RESUME_IDLE 開、HIDE_UI/PlaySpin 關；轉動中由 m_isSpinning 暫停，轉完不自動恢復）*/\\n    private m_isIdle = false;\\n    /**@ch 是否已註冊事件*/\\n    private m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    /**@ch 當前 12 格資料*/\\n    private m_segments: SegmentDescriptor[] = [];\\n\\n    /**@ch 事件列表*/\\n    private readonly EVENT_LIST: string[] = [\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_EXIT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT,\\n        FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.GET_TARGET_NODE,\\n    ];\\n    //#endregion 變數\\n\\n    //#region 生命週期\\n    onLoad() {\\n        this.RegisterEvent();\\n        this.DevAssertConfig();\\n        this.RegisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    onDestroy() {\\n        this.UnregisterEvent();\\n        this.UnregisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 每幀 Idle 緩轉：僅在 Idle 態且非轉動中執行（兩旋轉路徑互斥，不同幀寫 m_wheelNode）\\n     * 方向跟隨 m_clockwise（順時針 = z 遞減，與 ComputeTargetAngle 一致）\\n     */\\n    update(dt: number) {\\n        if (!this.m_isIdle || this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_idleSecondsPerRev <= 0) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const dir = this.m_clockwise ? -1 : 1;\\n        const deltaAngle = dir * (360 / this.m_idleSecondsPerRev) * dt;\\n        // 正規化防 BC-8 連續累積漂移（與 RotateToIndex 收尾一致），spin 起點讀 currentAngle 仍正確\\n        const next = NormalizeAngle(this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z + deltaAngle);\\n        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, next);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 生命週期\\n\\n    //#region 事件註冊\\n    private RegisterEvent() {\\n        if (this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = true;\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.Register(event, this));\\n    }\\n\\n    private UnregisterEvent() {\\n        if (!this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.UnRegister(event, this));\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件分派\\n     */\\n    OnEvent(event: string, ...args: any[]) {\\n        switch (event) {\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'object' && args[0] !== null) {\\n                    this.Init(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel INIT 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && Array.isArray(args[0])) {\\n                    this.SetWheelData(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel SET_WHEEL_DATA 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'number') {\\n                    this.PlaySpin(args[0], typeof args[1] === 'function' ? args[1] : undefined);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel PLAY_SPIN 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(false);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER:\\n                this.PlayEnter(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_EXIT:\\n                this.PlayExit(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE:\\n                this.ResumeIdle();\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT:\\n                this.HideResult();\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.GET_TARGET_NODE:\\n                if (typeof args[0] === 'function') {\\n                    args[0](this.GetTargetNode());\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel GET_TARGET_NODE 缺少 callback');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 取得目標節點（飛行演出起點）：m_targetNode → 根節點 → 自身節點 依序 fallback。\\n     * @returns 目標 Node（理論上不為 null；m_targetNode/m_rootNode 未掛時退回 this.node）\\n     */\\n    private GetTargetNode(): Node {\\n        return this.m_targetNode ?? this.m_rootNode ?? this.node;\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 事件註冊\\n\\n    //#region 方法\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 初始化（IF-1）\\n     */\\n    private Init(gameView: GameView) {\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n        this.m_isInit = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置 12 格資料並更新 icon（IF-2 / BC-5 / EH-2）\\n     * @param segments server 給的 12 格資料\\n     */\\n    private SetWheelData(segments: SegmentDescriptor[]) {\\n        // BC-9 行為約束：轉動中拒絕換資料，避免落點與顯示不一致\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 轉動中，拒絕本次設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!segments) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 資料為空');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 > 12 取前 12\\n        if (segments.length > FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${segments.length} > ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，取前 ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT} 格`);\\n        }\\n        this.m_segments = segments.slice(0, FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT);\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 < 12 → 渲染已提供格，其餘格保持預設\\n        if (this.m_segments.length < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${this.m_segments.length} < ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，其餘格保持預設`);\\n        }\\n\\n        this.BindSegmentIcons();\\n\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n\\n        // 待機慢速 Idle：資料就緒即進入待機呼吸/慢轉（BigWheel 一直可見），與 m_isIdle 同步\\n        this.PlayIdleStandby();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依當前資料綁定各格 icon（BC-4 / EH-2）\\n     * None / 無資料格 → 清空不顯示；其餘依 type 換圖。倍率值已移除，Label 一律清空防殘留。\\n     * FS_BG 底圖：僅該格 type 為 FreeGame 時開啟（作底凸顯免費遊戲符號）；其餘格關閉以保冪等（R-2）。\\n     */\\n    private BindSegmentIcons() {\\n        // 迭代固定 12 格確保冪等（R-2）：二次設定變少時，超出資料的格重置為預設，不殘留舊值\\n        for (let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n            const seg = i < this.m_segments.length ? this.m_segments[i] : null;\\n\\n            // 換 icon：None / 無資料格 → 清空（暫不顯示）；其餘依 type 換圖（BC-4）\\n            const spriteChange = this.m_segmentSpriteChanges[i];\\n            if (spriteChange) {\\n                if (!seg || seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n                    spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n                } else {\\n                    spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(seg.type));\\n                }\\n\\n                // FS_BG 底圖：與 icon 同生命週期，從同格 item root 取子節點（無資料/非 FreeGame 一律關，保冪等）\\n                const fsBg = spriteChange.node?.getChildByName('FS_BG');\\n                if (fsBg) {\\n                    fsBg.active = !!seg && seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.FreeGame;\\n                }\\n            }\\n\\n            // 倍率值已移除：清空 Label，避免殘留設計期/前一次的文字\\n            const label = this.m_segmentValueLabels[i];\\n            if (label) {\\n                label.string = '';\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 轉動並落在指定格（IF-3 / BC-3 / BC-6 / BC-7 / BC-8 / BC-9 / EH-1 / EH-3）\\n     * 守衛順序（DR-10）：① 轉動中重入 → ② 未初始化/無資料 → ③ landIndex 範圍\\n     * 完成訊號鏈（DR-2 / BC-7）：await 轉動 → await 落點演出 → callback → 最後釋放 m_isSpinning\\n     * @param landIndex 落點格索引 (0~11)\\n     * @param callback 完成回調，帶選中格 {index, type, value}\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySpin(landIndex: number, callback?: (result: SpinResult) => void) {\\n        // ① BC-9 轉動中重入 → 忽略\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動中，忽略本次請求');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ② EH-3 未初始化或無資料\\n        if (!this.m_isInit || this.m_segments.length === 0) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 未初始化或尚未設置輪盤資料');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ③ EH-1 landIndex 範圍\\n        if (landIndex < 0 || landIndex >= FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel PlaySpin landIndex ${landIndex} 超出範圍 0~${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT - 1}`);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_isSpinning = true;\\n        // 轉動開始即關閉 Idle：轉完「不」自動恢復；待盤面其他表演結束由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復\\n        this.m_isIdle = false;\\n        // 快轉視覺：先重設 default skin（多次轉動避免殘留上一次落點功能圖），再播正常速 Idle 循環（轉動中的動畫）；\\n        // 停下時 PlayLandAnnounce 的 Collect 以 clearTrack(0) 自然蓋掉本 Idle。\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN);\\n        this.PlaySpineLoop(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Idle);\\n        try {\\n            await this.RotateToIndex(landIndex);     // BC-3 / BC-6\\n            await this.PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex);  // BC-7\\n            const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n            // callback 包獨立 try（R-1）：呼叫端 callback 自身例外不被遮蔽成「轉動失敗」\\n            try {\\n                callback?.({ index: landIndex, type: seg.type });\\n            } catch (cbErr) {\\n                error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin callback 執行失敗: ' + cbErr);\\n            }\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動/演出失敗: ' + e);\\n        } finally {\\n            // BC-7：釋放點在 callback 之後，避免演出/回呼期間被重入\\n            this.m_isSpinning = false;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 旋轉到 landIndex，停在頂端指針（BC-3 / BC-6）\\n     * 角度計算用 ComputeTargetAngle（依 m_clockwise 單向單調，不沿用會反向的 angleDiff）\\n     */\\n    private RotateToIndex(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n                resolve();\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            const currentAngle = this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z;\\n            const targetAngle = ComputeTargetAngle(landIndex, currentAngle, this.m_clockwise);\\n            const anim = { angle: currentAngle };\\n            tween(anim)\\n                .to(FeatureWheelManager.ROTATE_TIME, { angle: targetAngle }, {\\n                    easing: 'cubicOut',\\n                    onUpdate: () => {\\n                        if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                            this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, anim.angle);\\n                        }\\n                    },\\n                })\\n                .call(() => {\\n                    // DR-9：轉動結束後正規化角度，防 BC-8 連續轉動累積漂移\\n                    if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, NormalizeAngle(targetAngle));\\n                    }\\n                    resolve();\\n                })\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 落點演出（BC-7）：BigWheel Spine 取代結果展示牌——依落點 type 切 skin，播 Collect「中間功能亮起」，await 播畢才 resolve。\\n     * 時序：呼叫端在 RotateToIndex（轉輪停下）後呼叫，符合「轉輪停下來後中間功能亮起」。\\n     * Collect 播畢後中間維持亮起（end pose），退場由 PlayExit 的 Out（盤面回歸+暗掉）負責。\\n     * Spine 缺失（m_bigWheelSpine 未綁）→ PlaySpineOnce 立即 resolve，不 hang 呼叫端。\\n     */\\n    private async PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n        if (!seg) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // 先切到落點功能 skin（Multiplier/Upgrade/Shift 直對；FG/Grand/None → default），再播 Collect\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(TypeToSkin(seg.type));\\n        await this.PlaySpineOnce(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Collect);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch [已停用] 套用落點 type 對應圖到結果展示牌 SpriteChange。\\n     * ⚠️ Collect 動畫取代結果展示牌後無呼叫者；保留待美術定案後連同 m_result* 屬性整條移除。\\n     */\\n    private ApplyResultSprite(spriteChange: SpriteChange | null, type: FeatureWheelSegmentType) {\\n        if (!spriteChange) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n            spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n        } else {\\n            spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(type));\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch [已停用] 結果展示牌收場（HIDE_RESULT / SetUIShow(false) 呼叫）。\\n     * ⚠️ 不可在此關閉 m_resultNode——該節點現為 BigWheel Spine 的父容器，關閉會連帶隱藏 BigWheel。\\n     * Collect 取代結果展示牌後無實際收場需求，保留空實作以相容既有事件/呼叫；\\n     * TODO(清理)：result-card 路徑（ApplyResultSprite / m_result* 屬性）全面移除後刪此方法。\\n     */\\n    private HideResult() {\\n        // no-op：m_resultNode 已挪作 BigWheel 容器，不可在此 active=false\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 顯示/隱藏 UI（IF-4）\\n     */\\n    private SetUIShow(isShow: boolean) {\\n        if (this.m_rootNode) {\\n            this.m_rootNode.active = isShow;\\n        }\\n        // 隱藏 UI 時一併收掉結果展示牌，避免下次顯示殘留上一輪落點符號\\n        if (!isShow) {\\n            this.HideResult();\\n        }\\n        // Idle：顯示時開始緩轉、隱藏時停止（PlaySpin 後不自動恢復，須由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復）\\n        this.m_isIdle = isShow;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 手動恢復 Idle 緩轉（IF）+ 播 BigWheel Idle 待機呼吸\\n     * 用途：PlaySpin 後輪盤停住，呼叫端在盤面其他表演結束後觸發此方法才續轉\\n     * 注意：若仍在轉動中，由 update 的 m_isSpinning 守衛延後至轉完才實際緩轉\\n     * Spine：委派 PlayIdleStandby（default skin + 慢速 Idle 循環）；軟體 12 格緩轉與 Spine 呼吸為兩獨立層\\n     */\\n    private ResumeIdle() {\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n        this.PlayIdleStandby();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 進入待機 Spine：default skin + 慢速 Idle 循環（裝飾性呼吸/慢轉）。\\n     * 由 SetWheelData（載入待機）與 ResumeIdle（演出後回待機）共用，集中待機速度設定（IDLE_STANDBY_TIME_SCALE）。\\n     * Spine 缺失由 SetSpineSkin / PlaySpineLoop 各自 null 守衛，不 hang。\\n     */\\n    private PlayIdleStandby() {\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN);\\n        this.PlaySpineLoop(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Idle, FeatureWheelManager.IDLE_STANDBY_TIME_SCALE);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放進場 Active（一個 round 一次，落在第一次轉動前）；播畢回調。\\n     * 進場用 default skin（中間尚未落定功能）。Spine 缺失 → PlaySpineOnce 立即 resolve，不 hang 呼叫端。\\n     * @param onDone 動畫播畢回調\\n     */\\n    private async PlayEnter(onDone?: () => void) {\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN);\\n        await this.PlaySpineOnce(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Active);\\n        try {\\n            onDone?.();\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlayEnter onDone 失敗: ' + e);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放退場 Out（一個 round 一次，落在全部轉動與效果演完後）；播畢回調。\\n     * Out 的「中間功能暗掉」作用於當前落點 skin，故 setSkin(default) 放在 Out 之後（暗掉後再回 default 待 Idle）。\\n     * @param onDone 動畫播畢回調\\n     */\\n    private async PlayExit(onDone?: () => void) {\\n        await this.PlaySpineOnce(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Out);\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN);\\n        try {\\n            onDone?.();\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlayExit onDone 失敗: ' + e);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設定 BigWheel skin（null/失效守衛）。委派 BaseSpine.SetSkin（內含 setSlotsToSetupPose）\\n     * @param skinName skin 名（default/Multiplier/Shift/Upgrade）\\n     */\\n    private SetSpineSkin(skinName: string) {\\n        if (this.m_bigWheelSpine && this.m_bigWheelSpine.isValid) {\\n            this.m_bigWheelSpine.SetSkin(skinName);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放 BigWheel 單次（非循環）動畫，await 播畢/中斷才 resolve。委派 SpineKit（經 BaseSpine.PlayAnimation）。\\n     * Spine 缺失 → 立即 resolve；動畫名無效 → BaseSpine 內部 warn + 回 false，皆不 hang 呼叫端（DR-2 完成訊號鏈防 hang）。\\n     * @param content.thinking:
This edit creates the PlayIdleStandby method and refactors ResumeIdle to use it. Key points:

1. ResumeIdle now simply sets m_isIdle = true and calls PlayIdleStandby()
2. New PlayIdleStandby() method consolidates the standby animation logic:
   - Sets skin to BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN
   - Calls PlaySpineLoop with IDLE_STANDBY_TIME_SCALE (0.2) as second parameter
3. This method is shared by both SetWheelData (initial standby) and ResumeIdle (return to standby after spin)
4. Centralizes the standby speed configuration

The key change is that PlaySpineLoop is now being called with a timeScale parameter (IDLE_STANDBY_TIME_SCALE = 0.2), which hasn't been added to PlaySpineLoop's signature yet. This edit is setting up the call site before modifying PlaySpineLoop to accept the parameter.

content.text:
```xml
<observation>
  <type>refactor</type>
  <title>Extracted PlayIdleStandby method to centralize slow idle animation logic</title>
  <subtitle>ResumeIdle now delegates to PlayIdleStandby, consolidating standby speed configuration in one place</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>New PlayIdleStandby() method created with default skin setup and slow Idle loop at IDLE_STANDBY_TIME_SCALE</fact>
    <fact>ResumeIdle refactored to call PlayIdleStandby() instead of inline skin/animation calls</fact>
    <fact>PlayIdleStandby is shared by SetWheelData (initial load) and ResumeIdle (return after spin)</fact>
    <fact>PlaySpineLoop now called with second parameter: FeatureWheelManager.IDLE_STANDBY_TIME_SCALE (0.2)</fact>
    <fact>Method comment documents null-safety: SetSpineSkin and PlaySpineLoop guard against missing Spine</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Refactored idle standby animation logic into a dedicated PlayIdleStandby() method to eliminate duplication and centralize speed configuration. Previously, ResumeIdle directly called SetSpineSkin and PlaySpineLoop. Now it delegates to PlayIdleStandby(), which is also called by SetWheelData, creating a single source of truth for standby animation behavior. The new method sets the skin to default and plays Idle loop at 0.2x speed (IDLE_STANDBY_TIME_SCALE). This prepares for the next step: modifying PlaySpineLoop to accept an optional timeScale parameter. The refactoring separates concerns: ResumeIdle handles state management (m_isIdle flag), while PlayIdleStandby handles the visual presentation (skin + slow animation). Comments clarify that null guards in the called methods prevent hangs when Spine is missing.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>assets/Script/FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelManager.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>
```

    this.RegisterEvent();\\n        this.DevAssertConfig();\\n        this.RegisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    onDestroy() {\\n        this.UnregisterEvent();\\n        this.UnregisterTestKeyCodes();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 每幀 Idle 緩轉：僅在 Idle 態且非轉動中執行（兩旋轉路徑互斥，不同幀寫 m_wheelNode）\\n     * 方向跟隨 m_clockwise（順時針 = z 遞減，與 ComputeTargetAngle 一致）\\n     */\\n    update(dt: number) {\\n        if (!this.m_isIdle || this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_idleSecondsPerRev <= 0) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const dir = this.m_clockwise ? -1 : 1;\\n        const deltaAngle = dir * (360 / this.m_idleSecondsPerRev) * dt;\\n        // 正規化防 BC-8 連續累積漂移（與 RotateToIndex 收尾一致），spin 起點讀 currentAngle 仍正確\\n        const next = NormalizeAngle(this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z + deltaAngle);\\n        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, next);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 生命週期\\n\\n    //#region 事件註冊\\n    private RegisterEvent() {\\n        if (this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = true;\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.Register(event, this));\\n    }\\n\\n    private UnregisterEvent() {\\n        if (!this.m_isEventRegistered) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EVENT_LIST.forEach(event => eventManager.UnRegister(event, this));\\n        this.m_isEventRegistered = false;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件分派\\n     */\\n    OnEvent(event: string, ...args: any[]) {\\n        switch (event) {\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.INIT:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'object' && args[0] !== null) {\\n                    this.Init(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel INIT 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SET_WHEEL_DATA:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && Array.isArray(args[0])) {\\n                    this.SetWheelData(args[0]);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel SET_WHEEL_DATA 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN:\\n                if (args.length > 0 && typeof args[0] === 'number') {\\n                    this.PlaySpin(args[0], typeof args[1] === 'function' ? args[1] : undefined);\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel PLAY_SPIN 參數無效');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI:\\n                this.SetUIShow(false);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_ENTER:\\n                this.PlayEnter(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_EXIT:\\n                this.PlayExit(typeof args[0] === 'function' ? args[0] : undefined);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.RESUME_IDLE:\\n                this.ResumeIdle();\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_RESULT:\\n                this.HideResult();\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.GET_TARGET_NODE:\\n                if (typeof args[0] === 'function') {\\n                    args[0](this.GetTargetNode());\\n                } else {\\n                    error('FeatureWheel GET_TARGET_NODE 缺少 callback');\\n                }\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 取得目標節點（飛行演出起點）：m_targetNode → 根節點 → 自身節點 依序 fallback。\\n     * @returns 目標 Node（理論上不為 null；m_targetNode/m_rootNode 未掛時退回 this.node）\\n     */\\n    private GetTargetNode(): Node {\\n        return this.m_targetNode ?? this.m_rootNode ?? this.node;\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 事件註冊\\n\\n    //#region 方法\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 初始化（IF-1）\\n     */\\n    private Init(gameView: GameView) {\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n        this.m_isInit = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置 12 格資料並更新 icon（IF-2 / BC-5 / EH-2）\\n     * @param segments server 給的 12 格資料\\n     */\\n    private SetWheelData(segments: SegmentDescriptor[]) {\\n        // BC-9 行為約束：轉動中拒絕換資料，避免落點與顯示不一致\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 轉動中，拒絕本次設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (!segments) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel SetWheelData 資料為空');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 > 12 取前 12\\n        if (segments.length > FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${segments.length} > ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，取前 ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT} 格`);\\n        }\\n        this.m_segments = segments.slice(0, FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT);\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 < 12 → 渲染已提供格，其餘格保持預設\\n        if (this.m_segments.length < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${this.m_segments.length} < ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，其餘格保持預設`);\\n        }\\n\\n        this.BindSegmentIcons();\\n\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n\\n        // 待機慢速 Idle：資料就緒即進入待機呼吸/慢轉（BigWheel 一直可見），與 m_isIdle 同步\\n        this.PlayIdleStandby();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依當前資料綁定各格 icon（BC-4 / EH-2）\\n     * None / 無資料格 → 清空不顯示；其餘依 type 換圖。倍率值已移除，Label 一律清空防殘留。\\n     * FS_BG 底圖：僅該格 type 為 FreeGame 時開啟（作底凸顯免費遊戲符號）；其餘格關閉以保冪等（R-2）。\\n     */\\n    private BindSegmentIcons() {\\n        // 迭代固定 12 格確保冪等（R-2）：二次設定變少時，超出資料的格重置為預設，不殘留舊值\\n        for (let i = 0; i < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++) {\\n            const seg = i < this.m_segments.length ? this.m_segments[i] : null;\\n\\n            // 換 icon：None / 無資料格 → 清空（暫不顯示）；其餘依 type 換圖（BC-4）\\n            const spriteChange = this.m_segmentSpriteChanges[i];\\n            if (spriteChange) {\\n                if (!seg || seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n                    spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n                } else {\\n                    spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(seg.type));\\n                }\\n\\n                // FS_BG 底圖：與 icon 同生命週期，從同格 item root 取子節點（無資料/非 FreeGame 一律關，保冪等）\\n                const fsBg = spriteChange.node?.getChildByName('FS_BG');\\n                if (fsBg) {\\n                    fsBg.active = !!seg && seg.type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.FreeGame;\\n                }\\n            }\\n\\n            // 倍率值已移除：清空 Label，避免殘留設計期/前一次的文字\\n            const label = this.m_segmentValueLabels[i];\\n            if (label) {\\n                label.string = '';\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 轉動並落在指定格（IF-3 / BC-3 / BC-6 / BC-7 / BC-8 / BC-9 / EH-1 / EH-3）\\n     * 守衛順序（DR-10）：① 轉動中重入 → ② 未初始化/無資料 → ③ landIndex 範圍\\n     * 完成訊號鏈（DR-2 / BC-7）：await 轉動 → await 落點演出 → callback → 最後釋放 m_isSpinning\\n     * @param landIndex 落點格索引 (0~11)\\n     * @param callback 完成回調，帶選中格 {index, type, value}\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySpin(landIndex: number, callback?: (result: SpinResult) => void) {\\n        // ① BC-9 轉動中重入 → 忽略\\n        if (this.m_isSpinning) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動中，忽略本次請求');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ② EH-3 未初始化或無資料\\n        if (!this.m_isInit || this.m_segments.length === 0) {\\n            warn('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 未初始化或尚未設置輪盤資料');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // ③ EH-1 landIndex 範圍\\n        if (landIndex < 0 || landIndex >= FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel PlaySpin landIndex ${landIndex} 超出範圍 0~${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT - 1}`);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_isSpinning = true;\\n        // 轉動開始即關閉 Idle：轉完「不」自動恢復；待盤面其他表演結束由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復\\n        this.m_isIdle = false;\\n        // 快轉視覺：先重設 default skin（多次轉動避免殘留上一次落點功能圖），再播正常速 Idle 循環（轉動中的動畫）；\\n        // 停下時 PlayLandAnnounce 的 Collect 以 clearTrack(0) 自然蓋掉本 Idle。\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN);\\n        this.PlaySpineLoop(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Idle);\\n        try {\\n            await this.RotateToIndex(landIndex);     // BC-3 / BC-6\\n            await this.PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex);  // BC-7\\n            const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n            // callback 包獨立 try（R-1）：呼叫端 callback 自身例外不被遮蔽成「轉動失敗」\\n            try {\\n                callback?.({ index: landIndex, type: seg.type });\\n            } catch (cbErr) {\\n                error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin callback 執行失敗: ' + cbErr);\\n            }\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlaySpin 轉動/演出失敗: ' + e);\\n        } finally {\\n            // BC-7：釋放點在 callback 之後，避免演出/回呼期間被重入\\n            this.m_isSpinning = false;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 旋轉到 landIndex，停在頂端指針（BC-3 / BC-6）\\n     * 角度計算用 ComputeTargetAngle（依 m_clockwise 單向單調，不沿用會反向的 angleDiff）\\n     */\\n    private RotateToIndex(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            if (!this.m_wheelNode || !this.m_wheelNode.isValid) {\\n                resolve();\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            const currentAngle = this.m_wheelNode.eulerAngles.z;\\n            const targetAngle = ComputeTargetAngle(landIndex, currentAngle, this.m_clockwise);\\n            const anim = { angle: currentAngle };\\n            tween(anim)\\n                .to(FeatureWheelManager.ROTATE_TIME, { angle: targetAngle }, {\\n                    easing: 'cubicOut',\\n                    onUpdate: () => {\\n                        if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                            this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, anim.angle);\\n                        }\\n                    },\\n                })\\n                .call(() => {\\n                    // DR-9：轉動結束後正規化角度，防 BC-8 連續轉動累積漂移\\n                    if (this.m_wheelNode?.isValid) {\\n                        this.m_wheelNode.setRotationFromEuler(0, 0, NormalizeAngle(targetAngle));\\n                    }\\n                    resolve();\\n                })\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 落點演出（BC-7）：BigWheel Spine 取代結果展示牌——依落點 type 切 skin，播 Collect「中間功能亮起」，await 播畢才 resolve。\\n     * 時序：呼叫端在 RotateToIndex（轉輪停下）後呼叫，符合「轉輪停下來後中間功能亮起」。\\n     * Collect 播畢後中間維持亮起（end pose），退場由 PlayExit 的 Out（盤面回歸+暗掉）負責。\\n     * Spine 缺失（m_bigWheelSpine 未綁）→ PlaySpineOnce 立即 resolve，不 hang 呼叫端。\\n     */\\n    private async PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex: number): Promise<void> {\\n        const seg = this.m_segments[landIndex];\\n        if (!seg) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // 先切到落點功能 skin（Multiplier/Upgrade/Shift 直對；FG/Grand/None → default），再播 Collect\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(TypeToSkin(seg.type));\\n        await this.PlaySpineOnce(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Collect);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch [已停用] 套用落點 type 對應圖到結果展示牌 SpriteChange。\\n     * ⚠️ Collect 動畫取代結果展示牌後無呼叫者；保留待美術定案後連同 m_result* 屬性整條移除。\\n     */\\n    private ApplyResultSprite(spriteChange: SpriteChange | null, type: FeatureWheelSegmentType) {\\n        if (!spriteChange) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None) {\\n            spriteChange.ClearSprite();\\n        } else {\\n            spriteChange.ChangeSpriteByIndex(TypeToIconIndex(type));\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch [已停用] 結果展示牌收場（HIDE_RESULT / SetUIShow(false) 呼叫）。\\n     * ⚠️ 不可在此關閉 m_resultNode——該節點現為 BigWheel Spine 的父容器，關閉會連帶隱藏 BigWheel。\\n     * Collect 取代結果展示牌後無實際收場需求，保留空實作以相容既有事件/呼叫；\\n     * TODO(清理)：result-card 路徑（ApplyResultSprite / m_result* 屬性）全面移除後刪此方法。\\n     */\\n    private HideResult() {\\n        // no-op：m_resultNode 已挪作 BigWheel 容器，不可在此 active=false\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 顯示/隱藏 UI（IF-4）\\n     */\\n    private SetUIShow(isShow: boolean) {\\n        if (this.m_rootNode) {\\n            this.m_rootNode.active = isShow;\\n        }\\n        // 隱藏 UI 時一併收掉結果展示牌，避免下次顯示殘留上一輪落點符號\\n        if (!isShow) {\\n            this.HideResult();\\n        }\\n        // Idle：顯示時開始緩轉、隱藏時停止（PlaySpin 後不自動恢復，須由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復）\\n        this.m_isIdle = isShow;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 手動恢復 Idle 緩轉（IF）+ 播 BigWheel Idle 待機呼吸\\n     * 用途：PlaySpin 後輪盤停住，呼叫端在盤面其他表演結束後觸發此方法才續轉\\n     * 注意：若仍在轉動中，由 update 的 m_isSpinning 守衛延後至轉完才實際緩轉\\n     * Spine：委派 PlayIdleStandby（default skin + 慢速 Idle 循環）；軟體 12 格緩轉與 Spine 呼吸為兩獨立層\\n     */\\n    private ResumeIdle() {\\n        this.m_isIdle = true;\\n        this.PlayIdleStandby();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 進入待機 Spine：default skin + 慢速 Idle 循環（裝飾性呼吸/慢轉）。\\n     * 由 SetWheelData（載入待機）與 ResumeIdle（演出後回待機）共用，集中待機速度設定（IDLE_STANDBY_TIME_SCALE）。\\n     * Spine 缺失由 SetSpineSkin / PlaySpineLoop 各自 null 守衛，不 hang。\\n     */\\n    private PlayIdleStandby() {\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN);\\n        this.PlaySpineLoop(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Idle, FeatureWheelManager.IDLE_STANDBY_TIME_SCALE);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放進場 Active（一個 round 一次，落在第一次轉動前）；播畢回調。\\n     * 進場用 default skin（中間尚未落定功能）。Spine 缺失 → PlaySpineOnce 立即 resolve，不 hang 呼叫端。\\n     * @param onDone 動畫播畢回調\\n     */\\n    private async PlayEnter(onDone?: () => void) {\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN);\\n        await this.PlaySpineOnce(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Active);\\n        try {\\n            onDone?.();\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlayEnter onDone 失敗: ' + e);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放退場 Out（一個 round 一次，落在全部轉動與效果演完後）；播畢回調。\\n     * Out 的「中間功能暗掉」作用於當前落點 skin，故 setSkin(default) 放在 Out 之後（暗掉後再回 default 待 Idle）。\\n     * @param onDone 動畫播畢回調\\n     */\\n    private async PlayExit(onDone?: () => void) {\\n        await this.PlaySpineOnce(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Out);\\n        this.SetSpineSkin(BIG_WHEEL_DEFAULT_SKIN);\\n        try {\\n            onDone?.();\\n        } catch (e) {\\n            error('FeatureWheel PlayExit onDone 失敗: ' + e);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設定 BigWheel skin（null/失效守衛）。委派 BaseSpine.SetSkin（內含 setSlotsToSetupPose）\\n     * @param skinName skin 名（default/Multiplier/Shift/Upgrade）\\n     */\\n    private SetSpineSkin(skinName: string) {\\n        if (this.m_bigWheelSpine && this.m_bigWheelSpine.isValid) {\\n            this.m_bigWheelSpine.SetSkin(skinName);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放 BigWheel 單次（非循環）動畫，await 播畢/中斷才 resolve。委派 SpineKit（經 BaseSpine.PlayAnimation）。\\n     * Spine 缺失 → 立即 resolve；動畫名無效 → BaseSpine 內部 warn + 回 false，皆不 hang 呼叫端（DR-2 完成訊號鏈防 hang）。\\n     * @param animName 動畫名（Active/Collect/Out）\\n     */\\n    private async PlaySpineOnce(animName: string): Promise<void> {\\n        if (!this.m_bigWheelSpine || !this.m_bigWheelSpine.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // BaseSpine.PlayAnimation 回 Promise<boolean>（播畢/中斷時 resolve）；此處只需等其結束，忽略結果旗標\\n        await this.m_bigWheelSpine.PlayAnimation(animName, undefined, false);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放 BigWheel 循環動畫（Idle 待機呼吸），不 await（循環動畫不等完成）。委派 SpineKit（經 BaseSpine.PlayAnimation）。\\n     * @param animName 動畫名（Idle）\\n     */\\n    private PlaySpineLoop(animName: string) {\\n        if (!this.m_bigWheelSpine || !this.m_bigWheelSpine.isValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        // 循環播放：isLoop=true；回傳 Promise 於首圈完成 resolve，不 await（不影響續循環）\\n        this.m_bigWheelSpine.PlayAnimation(animName, undefined, true);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch dev-only 設定斷言（DR-3/DR-12 緩解：驗節點數量，順序語意仍須人工核對 prefab）\\n     */\\n    private DevAssertConfig() {\\n        if (!DEV) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_segmentSpriteChanges.length !== FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel 設定異常：SpriteChange 數 ${this.m_segmentSpriteChanges.length} ≠ ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}`);\\n        }\\n        if (this.m_segmentNodes.length !== FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel 設定異常：落點節點數 ${this.m_segmentNodes.length} ≠ ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}`);\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion 方法\\n\\n    //#region 測試功能\\n    /**@ch 測試用：當前轉動落點索引（每次轉動 +1 循環 0~11）*/\\n    private m_testLandIndex = 0;\\n    /**@ch 測試用：當前 UI 顯示狀態（給 DIGIT_4 切換）*/\\n    private m_testUIShown = false;\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 註冊測試按鍵（僅 DEBUG 構建生效；正式構建零副作用）\\n     */\\n    private RegisterTestKeyCodes() {\\n        if (!DEBUG) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        input.on(Input.EventType.KEY_DOWN, this.CheckTestKeyCode, this);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 取消註冊測試按鍵（與 RegisterTestKeyCodes 對稱，避免監聽洩漏）\\n     */\\n    private UnregisterTestKeyCodes() {\\n        if (!DEBUG) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        input.off(Input.EventType.KEY_DOWN, this.m_segments[i] : null;\\n\\n            // 換 icon：None / 無資料格 → 清空（暫不顯示）；其餘依 type 換圖（BC-4）\\n            const spriteChange = this.m_segmentSpriteChanges[i];\\n            if (spriteChange) {\\n 1}`);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_isSpinning = true;\\n        // 轉動開始即關閉 Idle：轉完「不」自動恢復；待盤面其他表演結束由 RESUME_IDLE 手動恢復\\n        this.m_isIdle = false;\\n        // 快轉視覺：先重設 this.PlaySpineLoop(BIG_WHEEL_ANIM.Idle);\\n        try {\\n            await this.RotateToIndex(landIndex);     // BC-3 / BC-6\\n            await this.PlayLandAnnounce(landIndex);  // BC-7\\n content.thinking:
This is the final piece of the dual-speed idle animation implementation. The PlaySpineLoop method now accepts an optional timeScale parameter. When provided, it uses that speed; when omitted, it defaults to Game_Define.SpeedUp (fast-forward speed).

The changes are:
1. Added optional `timeScale?: number` parameter to PlaySpineLoop signature
2. Updated JSDoc comment to explain the parameter behavior
3. Pass timeScale as 4th argument to PlayAnimation
4. Updated comment to explain the default behavior when timeScale is undefined

This completes the implementation:
- IDLE_STANDBY_TIME_SCALE constant (0.2) for slow idle
- PlayIdleStandby() method calls PlaySpineLoop with slow speed
- PlaySpin calls PlaySpineLoop without timeScale (defaults to fast speed)
- PlaySpineLoop now supports both speeds via optional parameter

The dual-speed system is now complete:
- Slow (0.2x): when idle/standby via PlayIdleStandby
- Fast (SpeedUp): when spinning via PlaySpin's direct call

<observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>PlaySpineLoop now supports optional timeScale parameter for dual-speed animation</title>

    <fact>PlaySpin calls PlaySpineLoop without timeScale argument, using fast default speed</fact>

  <narrative>Completed the dual-speed idle animation system by adding an optional timeScale parameter to PlaySpineLoop. The method now supports two distinct speeds: when timeScale is provided (e.g., 0.2 from IDLE_STANDBY_TIME_SCALE), the animation plays at that explicit slow speed for decorative standby breathing; when timeScale is omitted, PlayAnimation's default parameter triggers and uses Game_Define.SpeedUp, providing fast-forward playback during wheel spinning. This design leverages the existing BaseSpine/PlayAnimation infrastructure which already has SpeedUp integration as its default behavior. The implementation is complete: PlayIdleStandby passes the slow constant for waiting states, while PlaySpin's direct call uses the fast default for active spinning. Comments document the default behavior explicitly to clarify when and why each speed applies. This completes Conflict 1 implementation: BigWheel Idle now has context-aware speed that responds to wheel activity state.</narrative>
